hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/plans\/.*\.md$/.test(f.replace(/\\\\/g,'/'))){const c=i.tool_input?.content||'';const issues=[];if(!/작성일|date/i.test(c))issues.push('문서에 작성일 누락');if(!/상태|status/i.test(c))issues.push('문서에 상태(Draft/Approved) 누락');if(issues.length){console.error('[Doc Format] 문서 포맷 경고:');issues.forEach(i=>console.error('  - '+i))}}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Check document format: warn about missing date/status in plans/ documents
